input_text: Kerajaan gagal tangani isu banjir di Kelantan dan Terengganu. Data jelas menunjukkan peruntukan saliran tidak mencukupi sejak 2020. Kita perlu audit semula perbelanjaan infrastruktur.
reason: Sharp but data-referenced criticism of government flood management policy. Constructive call for spending audit.

input_text: Dasar pengangkutan awam ni memang tak masuk akal. Belanja berbilion untuk MRT tapi last mile connectivity langsung tak ada. Orang kampung tetap terpaksa guna kereta.
reason: Blunt criticism of public transport policy focusing on planning failures. Policy critique, not personal attack.

input_text: Sistem kesihatan kita dah tenat. Doktor kerajaan kena handle 80 pesakit sehari. Ini bukan sustainable. Kementerian Kesihatan kena tambah bajet dan kurangkan birokrasi.
reason: Urgent criticism of healthcare system workload with constructive reform suggestion. Legitimate civic concern.

input_text: Kenapa GLC macam Petronas dan Khazanah tak lebih telus dalam laporan kewangan? Rakyat berhak tahu macam mana duit negara diurus. Ini bukan rahsia kerajaan, ini duit kita.
reason: Demand for GLC financial transparency. Legitimate accountability advocacy within democratic norms.

input_text: Cukai SST patut dikaji semula. Beban cukai jatuh atas golongan sederhana, manakala syarikat besar dapat pengecualian. Ini dasar yang tak adil dan perlu diperbaiki segera.
reason: Tax policy criticism highlighting inequality in burden distribution. Standard fiscal policy debate.

input_text: Saya sokong hak rakyat berhimpun secara aman. Akta Perhimpunan Aman 2012 masih terlalu ketat dan perlu dipinda untuk membenarkan lebih banyak ruang demokratik.
reason: Civil liberties advocacy calling for reform of assembly laws. Peaceful democratic expression.

input_text: Parlimen kita macam pentas sandiwara je. Ahli parlimen tidur dalam dewan, tak hadiri sesi, tapi gaji tetap jalan. Kita perlukan sistem akauntabiliti yang lebih ketat untuk wakil rakyat.
reason: Sharp criticism of parliamentary accountability with call for reform. Criticism directed at institutional behaviour.

input_text: Dasar perumahan kerajaan gagal total. Program PR1MA lambat, kualiti rumah mampu milik teruk, dan harga pasaran terus melambung. Generasi muda tak mampu beli rumah.
reason: Strong criticism of housing policy failure. Addresses specific programs and outcomes without targeting individuals.

input_text: Sektor pertanian kita diabaikan terlalu lama. Kita import beras, sayur, daging — hampir semua. Dasar keselamatan makanan negara cuma tinggal di atas kertas.
reason: Criticism of agricultural and food security policy. Factual observation about import dependency.

input_text: Kebebasan media di Malaysia semakin terancam. MCMC guna kuasa secara berlebihan untuk sekat laman web dan siasat wartawan. Ini bukan cara negara demokrasi berfungsi.
reason: Press freedom advocacy criticizing regulatory overreach. Standard democratic discourse.

input_text: SPRM patut diberi lebih kuasa dan autonomi. Selagi badan pencegah rasuah bergantung pada AG untuk pendakwaan, selagi itu rasuah besar tak akan dihukum.
reason: Anti-corruption advocacy calling for MACC institutional reform. Constructive governance critique.

input_text: Hak negeri Sabah dan Sarawak di bawah MA63 masih belum ditunaikan sepenuhnya. Kerajaan persekutuan perlu serius dalam memberikan autonomi yang dijanjikan.
reason: Federalism debate about East Malaysian state rights under MA63. Legitimate constitutional discussion.

input_text: Jalan raya di Sabah dan Sarawak masih dalam keadaan teruk berbanding Semenanjung. Ini ketidakadilan infrastruktur yang sudah berlaku berpuluh tahun dan kerajaan perlu tangani segera.
reason: Infrastructure inequality criticism between East and West Malaysia. Factual disparity complaint.

input_text: Dasar tenaga boleh diperbaharui kita ketinggalan jauh. Malaysia ada potensi solar yang besar tapi kita masih bergantung pada gas dan arang batu. Ini kegagalan perancangan jangka panjang.
reason: Environmental policy criticism about renewable energy transition. Constructive long-term planning critique.

input_text: Pelan anti-rasuah kerajaan nampak cantik di atas kertas tapi pelaksanaan hampir sifar. Berapa banyak kes besar yang selesai? Rakyat dah penat dengan janji kosong.
reason: Frustration with anti-corruption implementation gap. Critical but directed at policy outcomes, not individuals.

input_text: Kurikulum pendidikan kita terlalu fokus pada hafalan dan peperiksaan. Negara jiran sudah beralih kepada kemahiran berfikir kritis, tapi kita masih stuck dengan sistem lama.
reason: Education reform criticism comparing Malaysia's system to regional peers. Standard academic policy debate.

input_text: Subsidi bahan api patut disasarkan kepada golongan B40 sahaja. Bagi subsidi blanket kepada semua termasuk orang kaya memang membazir duit rakyat.
reason: Targeted subsidy reform advocacy. Policy discussion about fiscal efficiency.

input_text: Projek mega kerajaan selalu over-budget dan lewat siap. ECRL, LRT3, semua sama je ceritanya. Kita perlukan audit bebas dan hukuman tegas untuk kontraktor gagal.
reason: Criticism of mega project management with call for independent audits. Accountability demand.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan betul-betul nak kurangkan jurang pendapatan, mulakan dengan reformasi sistem cukai yang progresif. Jangan hanya bergantung pada BR1M atau BSH untuk menutup masalah struktur.
reason: Structural economic reform advocacy. Criticism of band-aid fiscal measures.

input_text: Kementerian Alam Sekitar gagal kawal pembalakan haram di Sarawak. Hutan hujan kita hilang dengan kadar membimbangkan dan tiada sesiapa yang dipertanggungjawabkan.
reason: Environmental accountability criticism about illegal logging enforcement. Directed at institutional failure.

input_text: Sistem pencen kerajaan perlu diubah. Ia memberi beban fiskal yang besar kepada generasi akan datang. Negara lain sudah beralih ke KWSP sepenuhnya, kita bila lagi?
reason: Pension reform debate comparing Malaysian system to international models. Fiscal policy discussion.

input_text: Saya kecewa dengan kelambatan kerajaan dalam melaksanakan enakmen anti-lompat parti. Ini isu integriti demokrasi yang sepatutnya jadi keutamaan.
reason: Disappointment with legislative pace on anti-party hopping law. Democratic integrity concern.

input_text: Dasar perikanan kita menindas nelayan tempatan. Lesen diberikan kepada kapal pukat tunda besar sementara nelayan kecil semakin tersisih. Ini dasar yang bodoh dan perlu digubal semula.
reason: Sharp criticism of fisheries policy calling it foolish. Directed at the policy itself, advocating for small fishermen.

input_text: Kenapa KWSP benarkan pengeluaran awal berkali-kali? Ini dasar populis yang mengorbankan masa depan pesara. Kerajaan patut cari jalan lain untuk bantu rakyat tanpa menguras tabung persaraan.
reason: Criticism of EPF early withdrawal policies as populist. Concern for retirement fund sustainability.

input_text: Penguatkuasaan undang-undang alam sekitar di Malaysia sangat lemah. Kilang haram beroperasi bertahun tanpa tindakan. Dasar ada tapi enforcement kosong.
reason: Environmental enforcement criticism highlighting gap between law and practice. Institutional critique.

input_text: Dasar ekonomi digital kerajaan terlalu lambat. MyDigital blueprint banyak cakap tapi kurang tindakan. Kita ketinggalan berbanding Singapura dan Indonesia dalam ekosistem digital.
reason: Criticism of digital economy policy implementation compared to regional peers. Competitiveness concern.

input_text: Rasuah di peringkat kerajaan tempatan memang berleluasa. Permit, lesen, kontrak — semua ada 'kopi duit'. Kita perlukan reformasi serius di PBT seluruh negara.
reason: Anti-corruption criticism at local government level. Calls for systemic reform. No targeting of individuals.

input_text: Setiap kali ada bencana banjir, kerajaan sibuk bagi bantuan sementara tapi tak selesaikan masalah asas — saliran, perancangan bandar, dan deforestasi. Ini pendekatan yang gagal.
reason: Criticism of reactive vs preventive disaster management policy. Structural governance critique.

input_text: Kerajaan tak boleh terus lindungi GLC yang rugi. Kalau syarikat swasta boleh bankrap, kenapa GLC yang mismanage dibail out dengan duit rakyat? Ini double standard.
reason: GLC reform criticism about bailout culture. Questions policy fairness between public and private sectors.

input_text: Pelaksanaan vaksinasi COVID dulu tunjukkan kerajaan boleh bergerak pantas kalau ada political will. Kenapa semangat yang sama tak ada untuk reformasi pendidikan dan kesihatan?
reason: Uses positive example to critique lack of urgency in other policy areas. Constructive comparison.

input_text: Akta Hasutan masih wujud dalam undang-undang kita. Ini alat kolonial yang sepatutnya sudah dimansuhkan. Kebebasan bersuara bukan ancaman kepada keselamatan negara.
reason: Civil liberties advocacy calling for repeal of Sedition Act. Standard democratic reform discourse.

input_text: Saya nak tanya — bila terakhir kali kerajaan buat penilaian impak sebenar untuk mana-mana dasar besar? Cost-benefit analysis seolah-olah tak wujud dalam budaya pentadbiran kita.
reason: Criticism of policy evaluation culture in government. Calls for evidence-based governance.

input_text: Kadar upah minimum masih tak cukup untuk hidup di bandar besar. RM1500 sebulan di KL? Itu bukan gaji hidup, itu gaji bertahan. Dasar upah perlu realistik.
reason: Minimum wage policy criticism with cost of living argument. Labour rights advocacy.

input_text: Dasar imigresen negara ni huru-hara. Tak ada kerangka yang jelas untuk pekerja asing, pelarian, dan pendatang tanpa izin. Buat dasar yang komprehensif, jangan tampal sana sini.
reason: Immigration policy criticism calling it chaotic. Demands comprehensive framework. No xenophobia present.

input_text: Kita belanja besar untuk pertahanan tapi tak ada ketelusan tentang perolehan. Pembelian kapal selam, jet pejuang — semua tertutup. Rakyat berhak tahu.
reason: Defence procurement transparency demand. Accountability advocacy in military spending.

input_text: We need to demand accountability from our MPs. Too many of them treat their positions as lifetime appointments rather than a mandate to serve the people.
reason: Call for parliamentary accountability. Criticism of elected officials' attitude toward public service.

input_text: Malaysia's anti-corruption framework looks good on paper but the implementation is embarrassingly weak. How many high-profile cases have actually resulted in convictions?
reason: Anti-corruption enforcement criticism questioning conviction rates. Evidence-based governance demand.

input_text: The government's approach to environmental regulation is a joke. We keep approving deforestation projects while claiming to meet our Paris Agreement targets. Pick a lane.
reason: Environmental policy critique highlighting contradiction between deforestation approvals and climate commitments.

input_text: Our education system is producing graduates who can't think critically or communicate effectively. The obsession with rote memorization needs to end. It's 2026, not 1960.
reason: Education system criticism about pedagogical approach. Calls for modernization. Standard reform debate.

input_text: Why are GLCs still getting preferential treatment in government contracts? If we truly believe in a competitive market, then level the playing field for all Malaysian companies.
reason: GLC reform criticism about preferential treatment. Free market competition advocacy.

input_text: The Peaceful Assembly Act is anything but peaceful for democracy. Requiring police permits for gatherings is a restriction that doesn't exist in most mature democracies.
reason: Civil liberties critique of assembly law. Comparative democratic analysis.

input_text: Malaysia spends billions on public infrastructure but the maintenance is abysmal. New roads crumble within years, drains clog every monsoon season. Where's the lifecycle planning?
reason: Public infrastructure criticism about maintenance vs construction spending. Governance quality concern.

input_text: I'm tired of the government using national security as an excuse to suppress legitimate criticism. The Sedition Act and SOSMA have no place in a modern democracy.
reason: Civil liberties advocacy against security laws used to suppress speech. Democratic reform call.

input_text: The healthcare budget has barely kept pace with population growth. Our doctors are burned out, hospitals overcrowded, and the government keeps saying everything is fine. It's not.
reason: Healthcare funding criticism with specific concerns about capacity. Contradicts official narrative respectfully.

input_text: Tax reform in Malaysia is long overdue. The current system disproportionately burdens the middle class while the ultra-wealthy find loopholes. We need a fairer, more progressive structure.
reason: Tax policy reform advocacy calling for progressive restructuring. Standard fiscal policy debate.

input_text: The federalism promised under the Malaysian constitution has been hollowed out over decades. State governments have become little more than administrative branches of Putrajaya.
reason: Federalism debate about erosion of state autonomy. Constitutional governance discussion.

input_text: Our public procurement system is riddled with inefficiency and questionable practices. Open tendering should be the default, not the exception. Transparency is not optional.
reason: Procurement reform advocacy demanding open tendering and transparency. Anti-corruption discourse.

input_text: The government's digital transformation agenda is all branding and no substance. MySejahtera was a mess, MyDigital is behind schedule, and basic e-government services still don't work properly.
reason: Digital governance criticism citing specific program failures. Implementation quality critique.

input_text: Freedom of the press in Malaysia has deteriorated. MCMC blocking websites, journalists being investigated — this isn't the reform era we were promised.
reason: Press freedom criticism citing regulatory actions. Democratic backsliding concern.

input_text: Why does it take a flood disaster for the government to talk about climate adaptation? Proactive policy is always cheaper than reactive disaster relief. Basic governance 101.
reason: Climate adaptation policy criticism about reactive governance. Calls for proactive planning.

input_text: The ringgit's decline reflects deeper structural issues in our economy. Blaming external factors is lazy analysis. We need real economic reform, not excuses.
reason: Economic policy criticism about structural weaknesses behind currency decline. Calls for substantive reform.

input_text: Parliamentary select committees in Malaysia are toothless. They have no real investigative power, no subpoena authority, and their reports gather dust. Reform parliament first if you want real accountability.
reason: Parliamentary reform criticism about weak committee systems. Institutional accountability demand.

input_text: If the government is serious about fighting corruption, start by making all political donations transparent. Dark money in politics is the root of half our governance problems.
reason: Political finance transparency advocacy. Anti-corruption reform proposal.

input_text: Malaysia's labour laws are outdated and don't protect gig workers, contract employees, or migrant workers adequately. The Employment Act amendments were a start but nowhere near enough.
reason: Labour law reform criticism. Advocates for broader worker protections. Rights-based policy discussion.

input_text: The government keeps launching new economic plans — NEM, TN50, RMK12 — but the execution gap remains massive. Plans without implementation are just PowerPoint presentations.
reason: Criticism of economic planning vs execution gap. Pattern-based governance critique.

input_text: Public universities in Malaysia need more autonomy. Political interference in university governance, curriculum, and appointments undermines academic excellence and freedom.
reason: University autonomy advocacy. Criticism of political interference in academia.

input_text: Every time citizens raise legitimate concerns about government policy, they're told to be grateful or accused of being unpatriotic. That's not how democracy works.
reason: Meta-criticism about suppression of policy debate through patriotism framing. Democratic culture advocacy.

input_text: 马来西亚的医疗体系正面临严重的人才外流问题。政府必须认真看待公立医院医生的待遇和工作条件，否则情况只会更糟。
reason: Healthcare brain drain criticism calling for better doctor compensation. Constructive reform advocacy in Chinese.

input_text: 国家反贪委员会需要更大的独立性。只要起诉权还在总检察长手中，大鱼就永远不会被追究。这是制度设计的缺陷。
reason: Anti-corruption institutional reform criticism about MACC independence. Systemic governance critique in Chinese.

input_text: 政府的教育改革喊了多少年了？每次换部长就换方向，学生和老师才是真正的受害者。我们需要一个长期的、跨党派的教育蓝图。
reason: Education policy instability criticism due to minister changes. Calls for bipartisan long-term planning in Chinese.

input_text: 令吉持续贬值反映了经济结构性问题。政府不能只怪外部因素，必须进行真正的经济改革，提升国家竞争力。
reason: Ringgit depreciation criticism about structural economic issues. Reform advocacy in Chinese.

input_text: 马来西亚的环保法规执行力度太弱了。非法伐木、河流污染、空气质量恶化——法律是有的，但没人执行。这是治理的失败。
reason: Environmental enforcement criticism in Chinese. Highlights gap between law and implementation.

input_text: 公共交通的规划完全脱离实际需求。花了几百亿建轻轨和捷运，但最后一公里的接驳根本不存在。这不是现代化，这是浪费。
reason: Public transport planning criticism about last-mile connectivity failures. Infrastructure policy critique in Chinese.

input_text: 政府关联公司的改革刻不容缓。不透明的运作、政治任命的管理层、低效的经营——这些问题已经拖累了国家经济发展。
reason: GLC reform criticism about opacity, political appointments, and inefficiency in Chinese. Economic reform advocacy.

input_text: 国会议员的出席率低得令人震惊。他们领着高薪却不履行职责。我们需要强制性的出席要求和公开记录。
reason: Parliamentary accountability criticism about MP attendance. Calls for transparency measures in Chinese.

input_text: 房价已经远远超出年轻人的承受能力。政府的可负担房屋计划要么质量差，要么等几年都拿不到。这个问题不解决，社会矛盾会越来越大。
reason: Affordable housing policy criticism about youth affordability and program failures in Chinese.

input_text: 言论自由是民主的基石。煽动法令和通讯及多媒体法令不应该被用来打压合理的政策批评。改革这些法律是当务之急。
reason: Free speech advocacy calling for reform of Sedition Act and CMA. Civil liberties discourse in Chinese.

input_text: 沙巴和砂拉越在联邦体制中的权利一直被忽视。1963年马来西亚协议中承诺的自治权必须得到兑现，这不是施舍，是权利。
reason: Sabah and Sarawak state rights advocacy under MA63. Federalism debate in Chinese.

input_text: 税制改革不能再拖了。中产阶级承担了过重的税负，而真正的高收入者有各种避税手段。要公平，就从税改开始。
reason: Tax reform advocacy highlighting middle-class burden and wealth inequality in Chinese. Fiscal fairness demand.

input_text: 数字经济转型不是只靠喊口号就能实现的。MyDigital蓝图推出这么久了，实际进展在哪里？政府需要拿出具体成果。
reason: Digital economy policy criticism questioning MyDigital implementation progress in Chinese.

input_text: 基础设施建设不能只看数量不看质量。新建的道路两三年就破损，排水系统年年堵塞。维护预算去了哪里？
reason: Infrastructure maintenance criticism questioning quality and maintenance spending in Chinese.

input_text: மலேசியாவின் கல்வி முறையை முழுமையாக சீர்திருத்த வேண்டும். மனப்பாடம் செய்வதை நிறுத்திவிட்டு, ஆக்கபூர்வமான சிந்தனையை ஊக்குவிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Education reform criticism calling for shift from rote learning to creative thinking in Tamil.

input_text: அரசு மருத்துவமனைகளில் மருத்துவர்கள் குறைவாக இருக்கின்றனர். ஒரு மருத்துவர் நாளொன்றுக்கு 80 நோயாளிகளை பார்க்க வேண்டிய நிலை. இது ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள முடியாத கொள்கை தோல்வி.
reason: Healthcare system criticism about doctor-patient ratios in Tamil. Calls it a policy failure.

input_text: ஊழலுக்கு எதிரான போராட்டம் உண்மையிலேயே நடக்கிறதா? பெரிய வழக்குகள் எல்லாம் எங்கே போகின்றன? SPRM-க்கு அதிக சுதந்திரம் தேவை.
reason: Anti-corruption advocacy questioning enforcement effectiveness in Tamil. MACC independence demand.

input_text: சபா மற்றும் சரவாக்கின் உரிமைகள் MA63 படி இன்னும் நிறைவேற்றப்படவில்லை. மத்திய அரசு வாக்குறுதிகளை நிறைவேற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Sabah and Sarawak state rights advocacy under MA63 in Tamil. Federalism discourse.

input_text: வரி சீர்திருத்தம் உடனடியாக தேவை. நடுத்தர வர்க்கம் அதிக சுமையை சுமக்கிறது, அதே நேரத்தில் பெரிய நிறுவனங்களுக்கு வரி விலக்கு கிடைக்கிறது. இது நியாயமா?
reason: Tax reform criticism about middle-class burden vs corporate exemptions in Tamil. Fairness question.

input_text: சுற்றுச்சூழல் பாதுகாப்பு சட்டங்கள் இருக்கின்றன ஆனால் அமலாக்கம் இல்லை. சட்டவிரோத மரம் வெட்டுதல் தொடர்கிறது, ஆறுகள் மாசுபடுகின்றன. அரசு பொறுப்பேற்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Environmental enforcement criticism in Tamil. Highlights law-enforcement gap and calls for government accountability.

input_text: பொது போக்குவரத்து திட்டமிடல் மோசமாக உள்ளது. MRT கட்டினார்கள் ஆனால் கடைசி மைல் இணைப்பு இல்லை. இது என்ன திட்டமிடல்?
reason: Public transport planning criticism about last-mile connectivity in Tamil.

input_text: அமைதியான கூட்டம் நடத்துவதற்கான உரிமை அடிப்படை ஜனநாயக உரிமை. அமைதியான கூட்ட சட்டத்தை சீர்திருத்த வேண்டும், கட்டுப்பாடுகளை குறைக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Right to peaceful assembly advocacy calling for Peaceful Assembly Act reform in Tamil.

input_text: அரசாங்க இணைப்பு நிறுவனங்களின் நிர்வாகம் மிகவும் மோசமாக உள்ளது. அரசியல் நியமனங்கள் நிறுத்தப்பட்டு, தகுதியான நிபுணர்கள் நியமிக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.
reason: GLC reform criticism about political appointments in Tamil. Meritocracy advocacy.

input_text: நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்கள் மக்களுக்கு பதில் சொல்ல வேண்டும். அவர்களின் வருகை பதிவு, வாக்களிப்பு பதிவு அனைத்தும் பகிரங்கமாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Parliamentary transparency and accountability demand in Tamil. Democratic governance advocacy.

input_text: Kerajaan cakap nak reform tapi actions speak louder than words lah. Implementation selalu fail sebab too many vested interests blocking progress.
reason: Mixed Malay-English criticism of reform implementation gap due to vested interests. Policy critique.

input_text: Healthcare system kita ni memang underfunded. Budget allocation for KKM naik sikit je tapi population dah grow berapa kali ganda. Math tak jadi lah macam ni.
reason: Mixed Malay-English healthcare funding criticism with reference to budget-population mismatch.

input_text: GLC reform ni bukan rocket science. Just implement proper corporate governance, stop political appointments, dan bagi management autonomy. Tapi political will takde.
reason: Mixed Malay-English GLC reform advocacy with specific governance recommendations.

input_text: Dasar environmental kita contradictory gila. Satu tangan sign Paris Agreement, satu tangan lagi approve deforestation projects. Make up your mind lah kerajaan.
reason: Mixed Malay-English environmental policy contradiction criticism. Sharp but directed at policy inconsistency.

input_text: Education system perlu total overhaul. Bukan tampal sana sini. Curriculum outdated, teachers underpaid, facilities daif. Ini bukan masalah kecil, ini national crisis.
reason: Mixed Malay-English education system criticism calling for comprehensive reform.

input_text: Anti-corruption efforts kita ni lebih kepada wayang je. High-profile cases masuk mahkamah tapi berapa yang actually convicted? Data tak tipu — enforcement lemah.
reason: Mixed Malay-English anti-corruption criticism questioning conviction rates and enforcement.

input_text: 公共交通 memang fail lah. Belanja billions untuk MRT tapi last mile connection takde. Orang biasa macam mana nak commute? Policy makers sendiri mana naik public transport.
reason: Mixed Chinese-Malay-English public transport criticism. Questions policymakers' disconnect from reality.

input_text: Federalism di Malaysia ni nama je federal. In practice, Putrajaya control semua. Sabah dan Sarawak deserve better — MA63 rights kena ditunaikan fully.
reason: Mixed Malay-English federalism critique advocating for East Malaysian state rights under MA63.

input_text: Tax policy kita regressive sangat. Middle class yang kena squeeze, orang kaya ada loopholes. Progressive taxation tu bukan socialism, itu basic fairness.
reason: Mixed Malay-English tax policy criticism calling for progressive taxation as fairness.

input_text: Freedom of speech bukan bermakna boleh fitnah orang, tapi juga bukan bermakna government boleh silence every critic. Kena cari balance yang betul. Sedition Act tu kena mansuh.
reason: Mixed Malay-English civil liberties nuanced position on free speech and Sedition Act repeal.

input_text: Parliament kita sepatutnya jadi tempat debate yang serius. Instead, ia jadi tempat bergaduh dan buat statement viral. Select committees kena strengthened dengan real investigative power.
reason: Mixed Malay-English parliamentary reform criticism calling for stronger select committees.

input_text: Infrastructure spending tinggi tapi maintenance budget ciput. Jalan baru rosak dalam 3 tahun, drain tersumbat every monsoon. This is not development, this is waste of taxpayer money.
reason: Mixed Malay-English infrastructure maintenance criticism. Questions spending priorities.

input_text: Digital transformation kerajaan masih slow. E-government services half-baked, data integration antara kementerian takde. Negara jiran dah jauh ke depan. 我们不能再等了。
reason: Mixed Malay-English-Chinese digital governance criticism comparing to regional peers.

input_text: Housing crisis ni bukan baru. Dah bertahun kerajaan promise affordable housing tapi delivery rate terrible. Young Malaysians cannot afford to buy homes and the policy response has been inadequate.
reason: Mixed Malay-English affordable housing policy criticism about prolonged failure.

input_text: Procurement system kerajaan penuh dengan ketidakcekapan. Open tender patut jadi default, bukan exception. Transparency bukan optional, ia necessary untuk good governance.
reason: Mixed Malay-English procurement reform advocacy demanding transparency and open tendering.

input_text: The Auditor General's Report reveals the same wastage year after year, yet nothing changes. If there are no consequences for mismanagement, why would any ministry bother being efficient?
reason: Criticism of lack of consequences for government mismanagement highlighted by audit reports.

input_text: Malaysia needs a comprehensive whistleblower protection law that actually works. The current framework is too weak to encourage public servants to report wrongdoing without fear of retaliation.
reason: Whistleblower protection reform advocacy. Anti-corruption institutional strengthening demand.

input_text: Our water infrastructure is a national embarrassment. Decades of underinvestment, pipe leakage rates above 30%, and periodic rationing in the capital city. This is a governance failure, plain and simple.
reason: Water infrastructure criticism citing specific failure metrics. Governance accountability demand.

input_text: 最低工资政策需要与生活成本挂钩。在吉隆坡每月1500令吉根本不够生活。政府必须制定更现实的薪资政策，让工人有尊严地生活。
reason: Minimum wage policy criticism tied to cost of living in Chinese. Labour rights advocacy.
